name: Casa Cabane
title: Step inside Casa Cabane without losing the thread.
tagline: A quiet lakehouse in the green borderlands, guided by real walkthrough footage.
description: Casa Cabane is the first complete House of Wander stay prototype: a cinematic gateway, full-screen walkthrough, Airbnb-informed practical detail, and a clear booking handoff.

media.alt: Casa Cabane in Stekene beside the water
media.caption: Casa Cabane Stekene main photo

chapters.label: Arrival
chapters.title: Enter through the green borderlands
chapters.text: The walkthrough begins before the house appears. The lane, hedges, and late-day light create the feeling of leaving the ordinary road behind.

chapters.label: Exterior
chapters.title: Reveal the cabin by the water
chapters.text: The exterior and glass facade become the first clear proof of place: Casa Cabane as a retreat, not just a listing.
chapters.detail: A clear brand moment before practical details enter.

chapters.label: Lake
chapters.title: Let the lake hold the pace
chapters.text: Water, trees, outdoor seating, and stillness are the emotional reason to stay. This chapter should feel slow, quiet, and spacious.
chapters.detail: The future home for a subtle lake-shimmer loop, if approved later.

chapters.label: Outdoor
chapters.title: Move through the outdoor rhythm
chapters.text: The retreat is more than a view: chairs, garden, fire, water, and open air become part of the stay.
chapters.detail: Proof that the atmosphere extends outside the cabin.

chapters.label: Interior
chapters.title: Step inside without breaking the spell
chapters.text: The living room and kitchen stay connected to the garden and water. Practical details appear only when they help the guest decide.
chapters.detail: Tests whether room chapters can feel natural inside the same take.

chapters.label: Stay
chapters.title: Turn atmosphere into a simple next step
chapters.text: For now the call to action stays direct: open Airbnb. Inquiry, direct booking, availability, and reviews can follow once the experience direction is approved.
chapters.detail: No backend overbuild before the visual system is proven.

listingHighlights.label: Guest favourite
listingHighlights.value: Casa Cabane is positioned by Airbnb as a guest favourite, with strong guest reliability and review signals.

listingHighlights.label: Setting
listingHighlights.value: A scenic lakeside position in Stekene, between Antwerp and Ghent.

listingHighlights.label: Outdoor life
listingHighlights.value: Lake garden, outdoor dining, BBQ, fire bowl, tank tub, and children's playhouse shape the stay rhythm.

stayStory.title: The stay
stayStory.text: Casa Cabane is a characterful lakehouse made for couples, families, and small groups who want nature without losing comfort.

stayStory.title: Inside
stayStory.text: The interior combines a high-quality kitchen, lake-facing dining, a comfortable living room, and a bathroom with a walk-in rain shower.

stayStory.title: Sleeping setup
stayStory.text: The bedroom has a double bed plus three single bunk beds best suited to children up to around 16. The living room adds sofa-bed options.

stayStory.title: Outside
stayStory.text: A wild garden, lake access, outdoor dining, BBQ, fire bowl, tank tub for hot or cold bathing, and a wooden playhouse shape the outdoor rhythm.

bookingSteps: Choose dates on Airbnb to confirm live price and availability.
Select guest count, with 7 guests as the listed maximum.
Review house rules, cancellation policy, safety notes, and final payment on Airbnb.
Keep payment and guest-host messaging inside Airbnb until a direct booking path is approved.
houseNotes: Smoke alarm listed; carbon monoxide alarm not reported.
Cleaning and post-checkout inspection are included in the Airbnb booking setup.
locationNote: Casa Cabane is positioned in Stekene, between Antwerp and Ghent, while the stay itself is anchored in nature, lake, garden, and quiet.
